name: Crockpot Italian Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 can of 16 oz tomatoes (or 2-3 fresh tomatoes, chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken breasts in the crockpot.
2. Add the diced tomatoes, onion slices, green pepper slices, and Italian seasoning.
3. Sprinkle with salt and black pepper to taste.
4. Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours.
5. Serve the chicken over rice.
Makes a good meal after a long day. I have also varied the recipe using beef or pork. I sometimes add other vegetables depending on what's in the fridge, such as zucchini, green beans, or peas.
